_comment: Image slots for the landing page. `npm run fetch-images` reads this, queries the Pexels API, and downloads each photo here. Components reference /images/<file>.
_products_note: The five product slots below are SPECIFIC branded products from the reference screenshot. Pexels won't have exact matches — drop the exact product photo into public/images/ using the filename shown (see README.md). The `query` is only a loose fallback if you run fetch-images.

images.query: fluffy shaggy rug living room floor
wall mounted music boxing machine led
